use_cases: Displaying developer profiles on team or about pages
Creating author bylines for blog posts and articles
Building speaker or presenter cards for events
Showing team member information on company websites
Creating social media influencer or content creator profiles
ai_summary: A responsive profile card component featuring a large square image, personal information, and social media links. Built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and Lucide icons, this card supports customizable name, title, description, image, and social media URLs. Designed with dark mode support and hover interactions on social icons, making it ideal for team pages, author bylines, and developer profile showcases.
